title: Deck review
description: Output of the deck-review skill: a scored, evidence-backed assessment of a generated deck against references/principles/house-quality-bar.md. The visual QA result (per-slide image inspection) MUST feed the visualIntegrity dimension.

deck.description: Path or name of the reviewed .pptx.

totalScore.description: Sum of the five dimension scores.

band.description: reject = <80 (return with fixes); internal = 80-89; external = >=90 (cleared for external delivery). Any unresolved visualQa break forces 'reject'.

messageLogic.description: /25 — 1 slide/1 message, conclusion-titles, narrative frame, clear goal-action.

visualIntegrity.description: /25 — no overflow/overlap, uniform margins, alignment, contrast, no AI-tells. Driven by visualQa.

designFidelity.description: /20 — one dominant + one accent, sandwich, tokenized type/color, consistent motif, theme match.

informationDesign.description: /20 — every slide has a visual, native charts, right chart choice + labels, right density.

contentIntegrity.description: /10 — honest claims, assumptions/definitions present, no unsupported assertions, tone fit.

visualQa.description: Result of the mandatory render-and-look QA loop.

ran.description: Were per-slide images actually rendered and inspected?

fix.description: Specific, actionable change (e.g. 'split slide 5 into two', not 'improve clarity').

verdict.description: One-paragraph summary: ship / fix-then-ship / reject, and why.

notes.description: Evidence for the score (cite slide numbers).
